summary: Iteration 42 - Testing StartupModal, Quick Actions APIs, Ollama Model Toggle - All features working correctly with one bug fix applied

integration_issues.issue: StartupModal.jsx was calling incorrect endpoint /api/positions instead of /api/portfolio

startup_modal_portfolio_endpoint.issue: StartupModal.jsx line 146 was calling /api/positions which returns 404
startup_modal_portfolio_endpoint.fix: Changed to /api/portfolio which is the correct endpoint

startup_modal.six_feature_cards: PASS - AI Trading Assistant, Real-Time Charts, Smart Watchlist, Live Scanner, Trade Pipeline, AI Validation
startup_modal.six_system_status_indicators: PASS - Backend, Alpaca, AI Assistant, Market data, Portfolio, Watchlist
startup_modal.get_started_button_enabled_on_connect: PASS - Button becomes enabled after systems connect or 10sec fallback
startup_modal.modal_respects_localstorage: PASS - Does not show on reload when localStorage set

quick_actions_api.POST_add_to_watchlist: PASS - 200 status, adds symbol to smart_watchlist collection
quick_actions_api.POST_create_alert_price: PASS - Creates price alert with above/below condition
quick_actions_api.GET_alerts: PASS - Returns list of active alerts
quick_actions_api.DELETE_alerts_symbol: PASS - Deletes alerts for specific symbol

ollama_model_api.POST_ollama_model: PASS - Changes model and persists to .env

quick_actions_ui.watchlist_widget: PASS - Found 5 QuickActionsMenu components in watchlist
quick_actions_ui.watchlist_compact_buttons: PASS - Found 10 compact buttons (add/alert) in watchlist
quick_actions_ui.scanner_widget: PASS - Found 1 QuickActionsMenu in scanner alerts

settings_page.page_loads: PASS - Settings page loads via sidebar navigation
settings_page.ollama_url_input: PASS - Input field shows current URL
settings_page.model_selection: PASS - 3 model options: Qwen 2.5 3B (selected), Qwen 2.5 7B, Llama 3 8B

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_quick_actions_and_config.py - New test file for Quick Actions and Config APIs
seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with TEST_ (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: StartupModal works correctly with 6 feature cards and 6 system status indicators. Quick Actions API (add-to-watchlist, create-alert, get-alerts) fully functional. Ollama model toggle in Settings page works. QuickActionsMenu components visible in watchlist (compact variant) and scanner alerts. Fixed bug where StartupModal was calling wrong endpoint /api/positions instead of /api/portfolio.
